ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the standard applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the standard to track updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for size recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* The size value (e.g., 28, 29) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement category */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* The measurement value corresponding to the size */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the clothing */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is intended (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES measurement_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence for the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "preferred_style" TEXT /* Preferred style of clothing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the customer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement category */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* The measurement value for the customer */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., Self-reported, Professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES measurement_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* The size value for the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger inventory replenishment */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_sales ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Size value of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sale */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., Returned, Not Returned) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned, if applicable */,
  "fit_satisfaction" TEXT /* Customer satisfaction with the fit (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES inventory ("product_id")
)
